implementation_summary: A 2D turn-based artillery game utilizing an inlined lightweight physics engine (e.g., Matter.js). To achieve the requested block-based destruction using the provided single-image castle assets, the implementation will slice the castle images into a grid of rectangular physics bodies at runtime. The player drags anywhere on screen to aim (rendering a dotted trajectory line) and releases to fire. The AI takes a simplified automated turn after the player.

gameplay.objective: Destroy the enemy's red castle before they destroy your blue castle.
gameplay.primary_interaction: Drag and hold to draw a trajectory line, release to fire a projectile.
gameplay.loss_or_timeout_condition: Player castle health reaches 0% or 30 seconds elapse.

entities.behavior: Sliced into a grid of physics blocks. Blocks fall and turn dark when hit. Health decreases based on blocks displaced.
Sliced into a grid of physics blocks. Takes damage from player projectiles.
Stands on/near the player castle. Acts as the origin point for the trajectory line and projectile.
Spawns on release, follows ballistic physics arc, applies explosive radial impulse on impact.
Fired by AI during enemy turn, targets player castle with slight random variance.
Static background, scaled to cover the screen.

asset_plan.processing: Compress to JPEG, scale down to max 1280px height to save space, base64 encode.
Base64 encode. Will be drawn onto a canvas and sliced into blocks at runtime.
Base64 encode. Will be drawn onto a canvas and sliced into blocks at runtime.
Convert to PNG during build, scale down to 128x128, base64 encode.
Convert to MP3, compress bitrate, base64 encode.

interaction_flow.player_action: Drag and hold anywhere on the screen
interaction_flow.system_response: Calculates drag vector, displays a dotted trajectory arc originating from the player character.
Hides trajectory line, spawns player projectile with velocity based on drag vector. Camera slightly follows projectile.
Projectile hits enemy castle. Plays Sfx.wav. Applies physics impulse to castle blocks. Updates enemy health UI.
Enemy turn begins after 1 second. AI calculates arc and fires enemy projectile at player castle. Updates player health UI.
Triggers CTA clickout to app store when win/loss condition is met.

parameters.name: projectile_impulse
parameters.gameplay_effect: Determines how violently the castle blocks fly apart upon impact.

parameters.name: gravity_scale
parameters.gameplay_effect: Affects the arc of the trajectory and how heavy the falling castle blocks feel.

parameters.name: enemy_accuracy
parameters.gameplay_effect: Determines how close the enemy's automated shot lands to the center of the player's castle.

parameters.name: castle_grid_size
parameters.gameplay_effect: Number of columns/rows the castle image is sliced into. Higher means more granular destruction but lower performance.

acceptance_criteria: Entire playable is contained within a single HTML file under 5MB.
No external network requests are made for scripts, images, or audio.
Castle images are dynamically sliced into physics-enabled blocks that react to collisions.
Player can drag to aim with a visible trajectory line and release to fire.
Game alternates turns between player and an automated enemy.
Health bars update dynamically based on castle damage.
non_goals_v1: Complex wind mechanics or environmental hazards.
Multi-stage levels or panning camera beyond a slight screen shake/nudge.
Perfect pixel-by-pixel destruction (using grid-based slicing instead for performance).
